problem id: c113055a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  00011111 -> 11001111
  11010100 -> 01101010
  11001000 -> 01100100
  10000101 -> 00000010
  01101101 -> 01110110
  01110001 -> 01111000
  10000110 -> 11000011
  10101100 -> 01010110

query: 10101001
predicted answer: 00010100
